titleStmt.title: SII 24.98: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 98. (A.R. No. 210 of 1951-52.) II PRĀKĀRA, INNER WALL OF THE NĀCHCHIYĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Seems to record the remission of certain taxes on some lands in lieu of a lump sum of money received by the Peruṅguṟi sabhā of Aṟindigaichaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Uṟaiyūrkūṟṟam in Rājamahēndra-vaḷanāḍu from Vaṇḍāḻañchēri-uḍaiyān Veḷḷāḷan Āṉai ••• alias Vāṇakōvaraiyaṉ of Tirunaṟaiyūr for offerings and baths on Ēkādaśi days to the god. The sabhā is stated to have met at the temple of Tirukkuṟuṅguḍiyāḻvāṉ. The record is dated in the 42nd regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiribhuvanacakkaravaṟtikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu kaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvva
pakṣattu Irupattonṟā ntiyeti peṟṟa cotiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa nāḷ rājamahendravaḷa nāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu brammadeya
m Arintikaic caturvvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom nammur tirukkuṟuṅkuṭi yāḻvān koyilile peruṅkuṟi kā
k kūṭṭik kuṟaivarak kūṭṭip paṇip paṇiyāl paṇittu tiruvaraṅkat tāḻvānukku [śrī] kolottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟai
yūr nāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻañceri Uṭaiyān veḷḷāḷan Āṉai Āna vāṇako sa nta nāḷāl
Ekādaśi tirumañcaṉam paṇṇi Aruḷavum mukkala Ariciyāl peruntiruvamutu Iṟṟai nā
ḷāl Appammutu ceytaruḷavum nāṅkaḷivar pakkal kācu koṇṭu Iṟai kāval maṅkalattu
kku kiḻakku parameśvaravāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 kaṇṇāṟṟu 3 catirattu rūpāy 4m ma ṅka vāykkālu
kku vaṭakkum mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu Añcāntuṇṭattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam ru 3 nilam Oru mā
(vum)The vu is written above the line over i in iraṇṭām of the lower line. ṭhese two letters may be redundant.Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iccatirattu nilam Iraṇṭu mā munṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Icca lāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu
Iraṇṭāñ catirattu nilam Orumā munṟāñ catirattu nilam nālumā māvum
koṇṭu va nilam munṟu māvum Āka nilam Onṟekāl na
parameśvaravāykkālukku vaṭakku mutal kaṉnāṟṟu munṟām catirattu nilam nālumāvum Ivvatikku
kiya maṇavāḷan kumiḻil ninṟum vaṭakku nokkip pona vāyk kālukkuk kiḻakku vaṭakkaṭai yani
ṅki nārāyaṇa paṭṭan paṇiyālum paṇikeṭṭup paṇippa paṇiyāl Ipporuḷ māvaṟuti poṟuḷcila
—pporuḷ cilavolai ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivarkku nāṅkaḷ cantirātittaval Iṟai Iṟukkak kaṭavom
—māvum Āka nilam Onṟe kālināl tiruvulakaḷanta paṭi nilam 2(1/2)m Iraṇṭa raiyum vaṭavūr vatikku me
—yuḷ Iruntu paṇittār kārampic ceṭṭu veḷḷaya sahasran paṇiyālum vaṅkip puṟattu viṣṇupaṭṭan paṇiyā
Digital edition of SII 24.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
